detail.instructions: Implement log_request_received(request_id: &str) with tracing::info!. Record event_name = "request.received" and request_id as structured fields instead of formatting them into the message.
detail.starterCode: // TODO: emit a structured request event with tracing.

files.content: // TODO: emit a structured request event with tracing.

hints.body: Structured fields belong before the message in the tracing macro.
Use %request_id to record its Display representation.
Keep the message constant so fields remain queryable.

detail.completionExplanation: The event now uses real tracing metadata instead of a custom log-record struct or interpolated string, and the test captures the emitted fields through a subscriber.
